## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, and `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] All commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit -s` — see CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] PR is focused on a single logical change
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed
